shortDescription: Translate text between languages using AI. Supports final-output translation for reports, messages, and research deliverables.
orchestratorUseCases: translate a document or research output into a target language for delivery
translate a message or report into French, Spanish, German, Japanese, or any other language
translate Teams messages or emails before sending
perform in-context translation during research tasks

tools.name: translate_text
tools.description: Translates text into the specified target language using AI. Supports any language pair. Preserves Markdown formatting by default. Ideal for translating reports, notes, messages, or research outputs as a final step.

text.description: The text to translate (Markdown supported, max 20000 characters)

sourceLanguage.description: Optional source language name. If omitted, the language is auto-detected.

preserveFormatting.description: Whether to preserve Markdown formatting in the output (default: true)
